arts.ttl: Ian Wright delivers emotional tribute to George Baldock after Greece star's tragic death
arts.sum: George Baldock, who tragically died on Wednesday aged 31, played for MK Dons during Ian Wright's spell coaching at the club and the ex-Arsenal striker has paid tribute

arts.ttl: George Baldock drowned while swimming in the pool at his home in Athens, his family say
arts.sum: Former Sheffield United defender George Baldock drowned while swimming in the pool at his home in Athens, a family statement has said.

arts.ttl: England and Greece pay emotional tribute to George Baldock after tragic death
arts.sum: Tributes were paid to George Baldock at Thursday's Nations League clash between England and Greece, with the fullback having earned 12 caps for the latter country before his death

arts.ttl: LIVE: England host Greece in the Nations League
arts.sum: Lee Carsley's England play without Harry Kane as they host Greece in the Nations League.

arts.ttl: Why England and Greece footballers are wearing black armbands in Wembley fixture
arts.sum: England, under the interim management of Lee Carsley, face Greece in the UEFA Nations League at Wembley on Thursday night, with the match going ahead following tragic circumstances

arts.ttl: Roy Keane explains why ‘brilliant’ Cole Palmer is a player ‘you’d pay to watch’
arts.sum: Palmer has reached double figures in England caps with his start against Greece

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Harry Kane playing for England against Greece?
arts.sum: England look to maintain their 100% start in the UEFA Nations League on Thursday when they host Greece at Wembley Stadium. Interim head coach Lee Carsley has impressed during his brief stint in charge and looks likely to retain the position going forward.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley makes bold change to England lineup as he seeks Phil Foden and Cole Palmer solutions
arts.sum: Interim England boss Lee Carsley knows he needs to get Phil Foden scoring for his country like he does for his club, while there is also a desire to see the Manchester City star in the same lineup as Bukayo Saka, Jude Bellingham and Cole Palmer

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley branded 'unhinged' after naming remarkable England line-up vs Greece
arts.sum: Lee Carsley is taking charge of just his third game as England's interim boss on Thursday night as the Three Lions host Greece in the Nations League at Wembley Stadium

arts.ttl: ‘So happy’: Bukayo Saka says everyone at Arsenal is buzzing over £65m player’s form
arts.sum: Arsenal have started this season about as well as they could’ve wished to. The Gunners are unbeaten in the Premier League, and they’ve scored a...
